interfaces.name: getHomepageHighlights
interfaces.description: Get featured devotionals, sermons, and next upcoming Sunday services for the home page.

interfaces.name: searchSiteContent
interfaces.description: Global search across devotionals and sermons from the home page search bar.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search text applied to devotionals and sermons

parameters.name: maxResultsPerType
parameters.description: Maximum results to return per content type

interfaces.name: getDevotionalFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the Devotionals page, including topic tags, reading time ranges, and date ranges.

interfaces.name: searchDevotionals
interfaces.description: Search and filter devotionals by keyword, topic tag, reading time, and date range.

topic_tag.description: Topic tag to filter by, e.g., 'anxiety'

date_from.description: Custom start date (ISO 8601) if no preset is used

date_to.description: Custom end date (ISO 8601) if no preset is used

interfaces.name: getDevotionalDetail
interfaces.description: Get full devotional content, scripture references, and reading-list status for the Devotional Detail page.

interfaces.name: saveDevotionalToReadingList
interfaces.description: Add a devotional to the single user's reading list, creating the list if needed.

interfaces.name: removeDevotionalFromReadingList
interfaces.description: Remove a devotional from the user's reading list.

interfaces.name: getReadingListItems
interfaces.description: Get all devotionals saved to the user's reading list for the Reading List page.

interfaces.name: updateReadingListItemStatus
interfaces.description: Update the status of a reading list item (e.g., mark as read or removed).

interfaces.name: getUpcomingSundayServices
interfaces.description: Get a schedule of upcoming Sunday services for the Sunday Services page and home page highlight.

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date to start from; defaults to today

parameters.name: maxCount
parameters.description: Maximum number of upcoming services to return

interfaces.name: getSundayServiceDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific Sunday service including location and childcare for the Service Reservation page.

interfaces.name: createServiceReservation
interfaces.description: Create a reservation for a specific Sunday service, including attendee counts and seating preference.

interfaces.name: getServiceReservationConfirmation
interfaces.description: Retrieve reservation confirmation details for display after submitting the service reservation.

interfaces.name: getBibleReadingPlansList
interfaces.description: List all Bible reading plans for the current user with basic progress information.

interfaces.name: getReadingPlanDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details and daily reading schedule for a specific Bible reading plan.

interfaces.name: getReadingPlanBuilderDefaults
interfaces.description: Get default values and options for the Plan Builder page (content scopes, default duration, reminder time).

interfaces.name: createBibleReadingPlan
interfaces.description: Create a new Bible reading plan with the specified scope, duration, start date, and reminder configuration.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Plan name such as '30-Day Old Testament Plan'

parameters.name: dailyReminderTime
parameters.description: Time-of-day string such as '07:00' for 7:00 AM

interfaces.name: updateBibleReadingPlanNotifications
interfaces.description: Update daily reminder settings for an existing Bible reading plan.

interfaces.name: pauseBibleReadingPlan
interfaces.description: Pause an active Bible reading plan.

interfaces.name: deleteBibleReadingPlan
interfaces.description: Delete or cancel a Bible reading plan.

interfaces.name: getPrayerPageContent
interfaces.description: Get explanatory content and configuration for the Prayer & Requests page.

interfaces.name: getPrayerRequestCategoryOptions
interfaces.description: Get available prayer request categories for the prayer request form.

interfaces.name: submitPrayerRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a prayer request with category, anonymity preference, and optional newsletter opt-in.

parameters.name: newsletterOptIn
parameters.description: Whether the user opts into the weekly prayer newsletter

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Optional email address used for newsletter subscription if opted in

interfaces.name: getDonationFunds
interfaces.description: Get available donation funds for the Give / Donate page.

interfaces.name: getDonationDefaults
interfaces.description: Get default donation settings such as processing fee percent and default frequency.

interfaces.name: createDonation
interfaces.description: Submit a donation to a specific fund, including optional processing fee coverage and dedication.

parameters.name: cardNumber
parameters.description: Credit card number (required if payment_method is 'credit_card')

interfaces.name: getSmallGroupFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the Small Groups page (audience, meeting format, day, time).

interfaces.name: searchSmallGroups
interfaces.description: Search and filter small groups by audience, meeting format, day, and time.

meetingTimeStartFrom.description: Earliest acceptable meeting start time such as '18:00'

meetingTimeStartTo.description: Latest acceptable meeting start time such as '20:00'

interfaces.name: getSmallGroupDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific small group, including schedule, format, and leader info.

interfaces.name: registerForSmallGroup
interfaces.description: Register the user for a specific small group.

interfaces.name: getGroupRegistrationConfirmation
interfaces.description: Get confirmation details for a small group registration.

interfaces.name: getSermonFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the Sermons page (topics, date ranges, rating thresholds, duration limits).

interfaces.name: searchSermons
interfaces.description: Search and filter sermons by keyword, topic, date range, rating, and duration.

interfaces.name: getSermonDetail
interfaces.description: Get full sermon details, media URL, metadata, and related sermons for the Sermon Detail page.

interfaces.name: addSermonToWatchLater
interfaces.description: Add a sermon to the user's Watch Later list, creating the list if necessary.

interfaces.name: removeSermonFromWatchLater
interfaces.description: Remove a sermon from the user's Watch Later list.

interfaces.name: getWatchLaterList
interfaces.description: Get all sermons in the user's Watch Later list for the Watch Later page.

interfaces.name: reorderWatchLaterItems
interfaces.description: Update the order of items in the Watch Later list.

interfaces.name: getStoreCategories
interfaces.description: Get store resource categories such as marriage, devotionals, and free_devotionals for navigation and filters.

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options (price range, formats, types) for a given store category.

interfaces.name: listProductsByCategory
interfaces.description: List products for a given category with optional filters for price, format, type, and free/physical flags.

isFree.description: If true, only return items where price is 0

isPhysicalShippable.description: If true, only return shippable physical items

interfaces.name: getProductDetail
interfaces.description: Get full product details for the Product Detail page, including price, format, and whether it is free or physical.

interfaces.name: addProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a product to the user's cart, creating a cart if needed.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents and totals for the Cart & Checkout page.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a cart item and return the updated cart summary.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a cart item and return the updated cart summary.

interfaces.name: getAvailableShippingOptionsForCart
interfaces.description: Get shipping options for the current cart, including free_shipping eligibility based on order total.

interfaces.name: setCartShippingOption
interfaces.description: Set the selected shipping option for the current cart and return the updated cart summary including shipping cost.

interfaces.name: placeOrderForCurrentCart
interfaces.description: Place an order for the current cart, collecting shipping and payment details and returning an order confirmation summary.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateReadingList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find or create the single-user ReadingList entity and return its id.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateWatchLaterList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find or create the single-user WatchLaterList entity and return its id.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the active Cart for the single user or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateDonationFees
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate processing_fee_amount and total_charge_amount based on amount, processing_fee_percent, and cover_processing_fee flag.

helperFunctions.name: _generateReadingPlanDays
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to generate ReadingPlanDay entries for a BibleReadingPlan based on start_date, duration_days, chapters_per_day, and content_scope.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateCartTotalsAndFreeShippingEligibility
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute cart subtotal, shipping_cost, total, and free_shipping eligibility from Cart and CartItem data.

helperFunctions.name: _validatePaymentDetails
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate payment details (card number, expiry, cvv) before creating Donation or Order records.
